info.english_meaning: to oppress to torment to harass to destroy to infect to torture
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: loqanaM hiMsanamiti yAvat  'rowane  rowanaM pratiGAtaH' iti kzIrasvAmI

upasarga_meanings.meaning: radda karanA bAjU me raKanA dUra BagAnA Coqa denA roka denA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prabADitA sahasA dEvyena' (f॰10.108.9)
'dEvyena balenAgrataH preriteti vivakzA bAhuByAM prabADate karmARi' (ni॰3.9)
'uzA ucCantyapabADatAmaGam' (f॰10.35.3) dUraM nayatAm
'SalyaM durapaharamanyato'pabADyamAnaM pAwayitvodDaret' (suSrute 1.101.4)
'teByo vE (fBuByaH) devA apEvAbIBatsanta manuzyaganDAt' (E॰brA॰3.30) jugupsamAnAH pfTagavAtizWantetyAha apaSabdaH pArTakyaM vakti manuzyaganDAt IzanmanuzyatvAditi jugupsAyAM heturuktaH
'apAmIvAM bADamAno mfDaSca' (f0 99743) apabADamAno'padrAvayan
'bADamAnA apa dvizaH' (f0 1903) ukto'rTaH
'ArAcCatrumapa bADasva dUramugro yaH SambaH puruhUta tena' (ni0 5242) Sambo vajraH apabADasva nASaya
'uzA yAti jyotizA bADamAnA viSvA tamAMsi duritApa devI' (f0 7782)
'mA tvA vfkzaH saM bADizwa' (aTarva॰18.2.25) mA sambADizwa=mA sampipIqat
'pItamAtre tu pAnIye na mAM sambADane kzuDA' (6.82.155)
'tridaRqataraRasambADam' (BA॰vi॰45.7) sambADam=saNkawam=duzpraveSam
'sasambADeva SiSutA saYcukoca SanEH SanEH' (Si॰BA॰2.38) sasambADA=sasaNkawA
'AkASavato vE lokAnprakASavate'sambADAn' (CAM0 u0 7122) sambADo'nyonyopamardaH tadrahitAn
'sambADamanye samprApya na SekuScalituM raTAt' (mAtsyapu0 17733) sambADo janasaMmardaH sambADaH saNGawwo varANgaM ceti hEmaH varANgaM Bago yoniH
'aNguzWAByAM cAvabADate' (BUmim) (kA0 SrO0 317) avabADate avapIqayati
'nirAbADo harizyAmi rAhuScandrapraBAmiva' (rA0 33620) nirAbADaH=nizpratibanDaH=nizpratyUhaH
'vi bADizwa sya rodasI mahitvA' (f0 7233) vibADizwa=vyabADizwa=pratyavaDIt
'te'surA digBya AbADanta' (tE0 saM0 5721) pratijaGnurityarTaH
'padA paRI~ rarADaso ni bADasva mahA~ asi' (f0 8642) nibADasva nipIqaya upapIqaya kadarTaya balAtkAraya
'ucCvaYcasva pfTivi mA ni vADaTAH' (f0 101811) mA nibADaTA mA nibADizWA mA nipipIqaH
'na cEkaH sa (viduraH) samarTo'smAnpARqavArTe'DibADitum' (BA0 Adi0 14222) aDibADitum upapIqayituM kadarTayituM viprakartum
'kaccitsaKIM vo nAtibADate SarIrAtapaH' (SA0)
'yadyagninodbADeta…apyagreREva yUpamaratnI sandaDyAtAm' (Sa0 brA0 42119) nodbADeta noddIpyeta
'yadaBizwite udabAData' (Sa0 brA0 5419) udabAData udaSvayat
'tataH sma mAgaDaM saMKye prati bADema yadvayam' (BA0 saBA0 1524) pratibADema pratibADemahi pratihanyAma pratipraharema hiMsyAma
'tasTO ca tatrEva mahADanuzmAn SarEstadastraM pratibADamAnaH' (BA0 BIzma0 8529).. pratibADamAnaH pratiGnan vArayan
'Bavizyanti vane yAni tapoviGnakarARi te raTena pratibADizye tAni sarvARi rAGava' (rA0 25250).. ukto'rTaH sumantrasya rAmaM pratyuvitariyam
'pari mAgne duScaritAd bADasvA mA sUcarite Baja' (vA0 saM0 428) paribADasva parihara parirakza pariRA DAtvarTabADaH
'ozaDayo vA etaM prajAyE paribADante' (tE0 saM0 2153) paribADante pratibaDnanti
